Pre: The following questions will pertain to your behaviors and cognitions BEFORE you had your psychedelic experience. Take some time to think about how you thought and behaved generally on the days leading up to your psychedelic session. Try to get into the headspace or mindset of who you were before the psychedelic session. When you are in this headspace, please continue with the survey.

Wanting to get off depression and anxiety meds

I don’t enjoy drinking and some weed strains make me anxious so I tried some shroom chocolate and gummies
Initially for fun, then found opportunities for the other purposes listed

Psychedelics_reason_5_TEXT: I was misdiagnosed and horribly over medicated by Joshua Lowinsky of Children’s Resource Group LLC. Overdosing on seroquel, Gordon, lamictal, invega, lithium. I also am in the tiny percentile of people who cannot take Prazosin as it induces a psychotic state which resulted in self harm. I used psychedelics to recover from these experiences and through a near fatal car accident. Since doing the work to heal myself, two other men with identical experiences have came forward and asked me for help.one older than me, one younger than me.
